center.name: 普吉特湾
center.summary: 普吉特湾是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括黑嘴天鹅、西丛鸦，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Although they were not seen at all during breeding bird surveys in Washington state in the early 1970s, by 2020 scrub jays are commonly found in the Puget Sound and even as far as British Columbia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In the winter, trumpeter swans migrate to the southern tier of Canada, the eastern part of the northwest United States (especially to the Red Rock Lakes area of Montana), and the northern area of the Puget Sound region of Washington state; migratory populations have even been observed as far south as Pagosa Springs, Colorado
